description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden wardrobe with a dark, weathered finish and a classic, slightly ornate design. The front features two large, vertically-hinged panel doors with subtle decorative molding and visible brass hinges. The top of the wardrobe has a gently curved crown, adding a touch of elegance to its otherwise rectangular form. The sides are plain with panel detailing, and the back is flat and unadorned. The legs are short and straight, providing stable support. The surface shows signs of wear, giving it a rustic, vintage appearance suitable for urban or outdoor settings.
description: A tall, dark wooden wardrobe with two panel doors, brass hinges, and a curved crown, featuring a rustic, weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large panel doors with brass hinges and a curved crown at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the wardrobe's depth, plain panel detailing, and the thickness of the doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned back with rectangular paneling and no visible hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side panels and door thickness.
